TestCase.name: testCalcChainRemovesAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT a, b + 1, UPPER(c) FROM src WHERE a > 0

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, EXPR$1, EXPR$2]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], EXPR$1=[+($1, 1)], EXPR$2=[UPPER($2)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 0)]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, EXPR$1, EXPR$2]) +- Calc(select=[a, +(b, 1) AS EXPR$1, UPPER(c) AS EXPR$2], where=[>(a, 0)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testCurrentWatermarkInFilterKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT a, b, c FROM src WHERE CURRENT_WATERMARK(rt) IS NULL OR rt > CURRENT_WATERMARK(rt)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[OR(IS NULL(CURRENT_WATERMARK($3)), >($3, CURRENT_WATERMARK($3)))]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c], where=[OR(IS NULL(CURRENT_WATERMARK(CAST(rt AS TIMESTAMP(3)))), >(CAST(rt AS TIMESTAMP(3)), CURRENT_WATERMARK(CAST(rt AS TIMESTAMP(3)))))]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testCurrentWatermarkInProjectionKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT a, b, CAST(CURRENT_WATERMARK(rt) AS STRING) FROM src

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, EXPR$2]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], EXPR$2=[CAST(CURRENT_WATERMARK($3)):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, EXPR$2]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, CAST(CURRENT_WATERMARK(CAST(rt AS TIMESTAMP(3))) AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS EXPR$2]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, rt])

TestCase.name: testEventTimeTemporalJoinKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT o.a, o.b * r.rate, r.currency FROM src AS o JOIN rates FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF o.rt AS r ON CAST(o.a AS STRING) = r.currency

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, EXPR$1, currency]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], EXPR$1=[*($1, $5)], currency=[$4]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{0, 3}]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=(CAST($cor0.a):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", $0)]) +- LogicalSnapshot(period=[$cor0.rt]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, rates]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, EXPR$1, currency]) +- Calc(select=[a, *(b, rate) AS EXPR$1, currency]) +- TemporalJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a0, currency), __TEMPORAL_JOIN_CONDITION(rt, rt0, __TEMPORAL_JOIN_CONDITION_PRIMARY_KEY(currency), __TEMPORAL_JOIN_LEFT_KEY(a0), __TEMPORAL_JOIN_RIGHT_KEY(currency)))], select=[a, b, rt, a0, currency, rate, rt0]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a0]]) : +- Calc(select=[a, b, rt, CAST(a AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS a0]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, rt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[currency]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[rt]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, rates]], fields=[currency, rate, rt])

TestCase.name: testProctimeLookupJoinRemovesAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT s.a, s.b, d.name FROM (SELECT *, PROCTIME() AS pt FROM src) s JOIN lookup_dim FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF s.pt AS d ON s.a = d.id

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, name]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], name=[$6]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{0, 4}]) :- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3], pt=[PROCTIME()]) : +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=($cor0.a, $0)]) +- LogicalSnapshot(period=[$cor0.pt]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, lookup_dim]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, name]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, name]) +- LookupJoin(table=[default_catalog.default_database.lookup_dim], joinType=[InnerJoin], lookup=[id=a], select=[a, b, id, name]) +- Calc(select=[a, b]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, rt])

TestCase.name: testRowtimeForwardingSinkKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO rowtime_sink SELECT a, b, c, rt FROM src WHERE a > 0

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.rowtime_sink], fields=[a, b, c, rt]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 0)]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.rowtime_sink], fields=[a, b, c, rt]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c, rt], where=[>(a, 0)]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testRowtimeIntervalJoinKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT s1.a, s1.b, s1.c FROM src s1 JOIN src2 s2 ON s1.a = s2.a AND s1.rt BETWEEN s2.rt - INTERVAL '5' SECOND AND s2.rt + INTERVAL '5' SECOND

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($0, $4), >=($3, -($7, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)), <=($3, +($7, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c]) +- IntervalJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], windowBounds=[isRowTime=true, leftLowerBound=-5000, leftUpperBound=5000, leftTimeIndex=3, rightTimeIndex=1], where=[AND(=(a, a0), >=(rt, -(rt0, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)), <=(rt, +(rt0, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)))], select=[a, b, c, rt, a0, rt0]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2, project=[a, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, rt])

TestCase.name: testRowtimeProjectedToSinkKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO rowtime_sink SELECT a, b, c, rt FROM src WHERE a > 0

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.rowtime_sink], fields=[a, b, c, rt]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 0)]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.rowtime_sink], fields=[a, b, c, rt]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c, rt], where=[>(a, 0)]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testSimpleSelectRemovesAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT a, b, c FROM src

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testStatementSetMixedBranches
TestCase.Resource:
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1, 2}], EXPR$3=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(window_start=[$4], window_end=[$5], a=[$0]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TUMBLE(TABLE(#0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'rt'), 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, BIGINT b, VARCHAR(2147483647) c, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* rt, TIMESTAMP(3) window_start, TIMESTAMP(3) window_end, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* window_time)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, c, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- Calc(select=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- GlobalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(slice_end=[$slice_end], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(count1$0) AS EXPR$3, start('w$) AS window_start, end('w$) AS window_end]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- LocalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(time_col=[rt], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(*) AS count1$0, slice_end('w$) AS $slice_end]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- Calc(select=[a, rt]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, c, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])

TestCase.name: testTumbleWindowKeepsAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO window_sink SELECT window_start, window_end, a, COUNT(*) FROM TABLE( TUMBLE(TABLE src, DESCRIPTOR(rt), INTERVAL '5' SECOND)) GROUP BY window_start, window_end, a

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1, 2}], EXPR$3=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(window_start=[$4], window_end=[$5], a=[$0]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TUMBLE(TABLE(#0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'rt'), 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, BIGINT b, VARCHAR(2147483647) c, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* rt, TIMESTAMP(3) window_start, TIMESTAMP(3) window_end, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* window_time)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- Calc(select=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- GlobalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(slice_end=[$slice_end], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(count1$0) AS EXPR$3, start('w$) AS window_start, end('w$) AS window_end]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- LocalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(time_col=[rt], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(*) AS count1$0, slice_end('w$) AS $slice_end]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, rt])

TestCase.name: testUnionMixedBranches
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO window_sink SELECT CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(3)), CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(3)), a, b FROM src UNION ALL SELECT window_start, window_end, a, COUNT(*) FROM TABLE( TUMBLE(TABLE src2, DESCRIPTOR(rt), INTERVAL '5' SECOND)) GROUP BY window_start, window_end, a

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[EXPR$0, EXPR$1, a, b]) +- LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[null:TIMESTAMP(3)], EXPR$1=[null:TIMESTAMP(3)], a=[$0], b=[$1]) : +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src]]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1, 2}], EXPR$3=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(window_start=[$4], window_end=[$5], a=[$0]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TUMBLE(TABLE(#0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'rt'), 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, BIGINT b, VARCHAR(2147483647) c, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* rt, TIMESTAMP(3) window_start, TIMESTAMP(3) window_end, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* window_time)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[EXPR$0, EXPR$1, a, b]) +- Union(all=[true], union=[EXPR$0, EXPR$1, a, b]) :- Calc(select=[null:TIMESTAMP(3) AS EXPR$0, null:TIMESTAMP(3) AS EXPR$1, a, b]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src, project=[a, b, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, rt]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(window_start AS TIMESTAMP(3)) AS window_start, CAST(window_end AS TIMESTAMP(3)) AS window_end, a, CAST(EXPR$3 AS BIGINT) AS EXPR$3]) +- GlobalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(slice_end=[$slice_end], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(count1$0) AS EXPR$3, start('w$) AS window_start, end('w$) AS window_end]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- LocalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(time_col=[rt], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(*) AS count1$0, slice_end('w$) AS $slice_end]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2, project=[a, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, rt])

TestCase.name: testWatermarkPushDownSourceWithWindowKeepsWatermarks
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO window_sink SELECT window_start, window_end, a, COUNT(*) FROM TABLE( TUMBLE(TABLE src_pushdown, DESCRIPTOR(rt), INTERVAL '5' SECOND)) GROUP BY window_start, window_end, a

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1, 2}], EXPR$3=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(window_start=[$4], window_end=[$5], a=[$0]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TUMBLE(TABLE(#0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'rt'), 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, BIGINT b, VARCHAR(2147483647) c, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* rt, TIMESTAMP(3) window_start, TIMESTAMP(3) window_end, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* window_time)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], rt=[$3]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src_pushdown]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.window_sink], fields=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- Calc(select=[window_start, window_end, a, EXPR$3]) +- GlobalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(slice_end=[$slice_end], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(count1$0) AS EXPR$3, start('w$) AS window_start, end('w$) AS window_end]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- LocalWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TUMBLE(time_col=[rt], size=[5 s])], select=[a, COUNT(*) AS count1$0, slice_end('w$) AS $slice_end]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-(rt, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src_pushdown, project=[a, rt], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, rt])

TestCase.name: testWatermarkPushDownSourceWithoutEventTimeRemovesAssigner
TestCase.Resource: INSERT INTO plain_sink SELECT a, b, c FROM src_pushdown

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[rt], watermark=[-($3, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src_pushdown]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.plain_sink], fields=[a, b, c]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src_pushdown]], fields=[a, b, c, rt])
